angles.argument: Radiation from cell phones is classified as a possible carcinogen by WHO's IARC, and 5G uses similar radiofrequency waves at higher frequencies
Some studies found increased glioma risk in heavy cell phone users, and 5G boosts data rates requiring more towers and exposure
Animals exposed to RFR in NTP studies developed tumors, similar to 5G non-ionizing radiation effects
search_queries: NTP cell phone radiation study rats
